title: clusia caudata
intro: Clusia caudata, also known as the monkey tree or calabura, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Clusia caudata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antacid, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Clusia caudata often involve making a tea or infusion from the leaves, or using the bark to create a decoction for its medicinal purposes.
